DataRequest.Name: Stealth Scan using a tool / SCW
DataRequest.Description:
Detects scans using a tool like NMap, Satan, Saint, Nikto etc
Alterada por Tiago Cardoso: Esta regra foi alterada para validar reconhecimento em redes internas.
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Stealth scanning tool attack from $srcIpAddr to $destIpAddr
DataRequest.DataSource: FortiGate via Syslog, FortiProxy via Syslog, Checkpoint IPS-1 via LEA/Syslog, PaloAlto PAN-OS via Syslog

SubPattern.name: IPSScan
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: reptDevIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_DEVICE_NETWORK_IPS) AND eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_ToolReconn) AND srcIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET)

IncidentDef.ArgList: srcIpAddr = IPSScan.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = IPSScan.destIpAddr,fwAction = IPSScan.fwAction,compEventType = IPSScan.eventType,ipsSignatureId = IPSScan.ipsSignatureId,incidentCount = IPSScan.COUNT(*)
